overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in a brown coat and cowboy hat traversing a rocky canyon. The character crosses a rope bridge over a turquoise river and continues along a narrow cliffside path surrounded by pine trees and rock formations under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path approaching rope bridge

events.description: horse exits the frame to the left, leaving the character walking alone
approaching the entrance to the rope bridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow rocky canyon path toward the rope bridge

notable_agents.action: horse briefly visible at the start before moving out of frame

entered.detail: tall gray rock face with red mineral streaks forming the canyon side
massive rock formation with large overhanging boulder
wooden suspension bridge with rope railings spanning the canyon
fast-flowing river with distinctive blue-green water visible through the canyon
natural rock arch formation visible in the distant canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky canyon path flanked by tall stone walls. A rope bridge spans the canyon ahead, with a turquoise river visible below. A horse briefly appears at the start before exiting the frame, leaving the character to approach the bridge alone.

scene_state.functional_zone: crossing rope bridge over canyon river

events.description: steps onto the wooden rope bridge, planks creaking underfoot
bridge sways slightly while crossing the midpoint over the river

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the wooden plank rope bridge suspended over the rushing river

entered.detail: thick rope handrails on the left side of the bridge
large overhanging boulder marking the bridge exit on the far side

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the weathered wooden rope bridge suspended high above the turquoise river. Thick rope railings line the sides as the character moves toward a rock overhang marking the far exit, with the canyon walls now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside path carved into rock face

events.description: exits the bridge onto the narrow cliffside dirt path
vegetation increases as the path descends toward the river level

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow dirt path carved into the cliffside above the river

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail etched into the rock face
tall evergreen pine trees growing along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the bridge, the character follows a narrow dirt trail carved into the cliffside. Pine trees begin to line the path as the trail descends, with the turquoise river now visible but further below to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested riverside trail with wooden barriers

events.description: dense pine trees temporarily obscure the river view on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forested trail beside the river, approaching wooden fence structures

entered.detail: vertical wooden posts marking the path ahead
broken wooden fence barriers lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through a more densely forested area with pine trees flanking both sides. The turquoise river remains visible to the left as the character approaches wooden posts and fence sections marking the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a rocky canyon that gradually transitions into a densely forested cliffside trail. It begins on a narrow path flanked by tall stone walls, where a horse briefly appears before the character approaches a rope bridge spanning a turquoise river. As the character crosses the weathered wooden planks and thick rope railings, the perspective shifts from the enclosed canyon walls toward a rocky overhang at the bridge's exit. The scene then opens onto a narrow dirt trail carved into the cliffside, where the terrain descends and the first pine trees begin to line the path. Finally, the environment shifts into a more densely forested area with pine trees flanking both sides as the character moves toward wooden posts and fence sections along the riverbank.
